cmd_type

enum cmd_type
SPIC_CMD_TYPE_SPI_PROGRAM 0x0
SPIC_CMD_TYPE_WRITE_STATUS_REGISTER 0x1
SPIC_CMD_TYPE_READ_STATUS_REGISTER 0x2
SPIC_CMD_TYPE_SECTOR_ERASE 0x3

SPIC_CMD_TYPE_CHIP_ERASE 0x6

SPIC_CMD_TYPE_WRITE_SECURITY_REG 0xc
